_comment_egress_manifest: Manifest for the egress ALLOWED-leg + host-local fencing demo (issue #27,
Task 4). The one allowed target is the tap gateway 169.254.42.1:443 — the
host as the guest sees it across the tap, where demo/egress.sh runs a
results-stub. Using the gateway IP (not a fake hostname) means the host
resolves it and the allowlist is driven purely by the grant: the perimeter
installs the matching INPUT ACCEPT, and the box reaches the stub *only*
because the grant lists it. A second host-local service on :8080 is NOT in
the grant, so the INPUT catch-all DROP blocks it — proving the box can't
reach arbitrary host-local services (the single-tenant hole this closes).

goal.description: Reach the one allowlisted host-local target and confirm everything else — external hosts and non-allowlisted host-local services — is dropped at the host tap.
